title: Add home page with navigation icons and home button

requirements.text: Create a new home page component that serves as the landing page for the application with a welcoming introduction to the bed bug educational app

quotes: add a home page for the app

acceptanceCriteria: Home page component is created as a new React component
Home page displays when users first visit the application
Page includes welcoming content about the app's purpose

requirements.text: Add navigation icons on the home page representing each main section of the app (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, find local help) with clear visual indicators of where to start
acceptanceCriteria: Each main section has a distinct icon displayed on the home page
Icons are clickable and navigate to their respective sections
Visual design clearly indicates these are starting points for users
Icons are organized in a logical, scannable layout

requirements.text: Implement smooth scroll behavior when clicking navigation icons on the home page to scroll to the corresponding section
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an icon smoothly scrolls to the target section
Scroll animation is smooth and not jarring
All section navigation icons correctly scroll to their targets

requirements.text: Add a persistent home button icon in the header or navigation that allows users to return to the home page from any section
acceptanceCriteria: Home button icon is visible from all pages and sections
Clicking the home button navigates back to the home page
Button placement does not conflict with existing header elements (Location Finder, Help, Share buttons)
Icon is clearly recognizable as a home navigation element

constraints: Use existing hash-based routing pattern from App.tsx
Maintain the current seven-tab structure in EducationalContent.tsx
Do not modify the existing Header.tsx component structure significantly
Use consistent icon styling with the rest of the application
nonGoals: Redesigning the existing educational content sections
Adding new educational content tabs beyond the existing seven
